implementedObjectClassification: bounded discrete-only persisted nonzero-shell reciprocal projected-block replay audit

targetBlindConstruction.shellRule: filter abs(lambda)<=1e-12, then select complete lowest abs(lambda) nonzero shell using spectral-only grouping tolerance max(1e-12,1e-8*abs(lambda_min_nonzero))
targetBlindConstruction.projectionRule: G_k = Psi_shell^dagger deltaK Psi_shell = weighted <psi_i, deltaA psi_j>_M

structuralDisclosure.kernelTopologyStatement: The four ambient isolated vertices induce 48 exact zero-row/zero-column complex fermion DOFs. The explicitly filtered 48-mode kernel is a mesh-topology artifact at this boundary.

hashDisclosure.unavailableMetadataExplanation: Current Phase12 artifacts do not persist geometry or M_psi hashes. Phase376 computes deterministic study-local hashes and verifies they remain unchanged through every replay.

conventionDefinitions.stiffnessActionMatrix: K = persisted Euclidean-Hermitian Phase12 assembled Dirac matrix
conventionDefinitions.stiffnessVariation: deltaK = persisted or analytic Euclidean-Hermitian first-variation stiffness matrix
conventionDefinitions.massPsiVariation: delta M_psi = 0 for fixed-mesh connection-only perturbations
conventionDefinitions.projectedBlock: G_k[i,j] = psi_i^dagger deltaK psi_j = <psi_i, deltaA psi_j>_M

explicitDiscreteOnlyNonclaims: kernel is an isolated-vertex topology artifact

solverNotes: Solved B=M_psi^-1/2 K M_psi^-1/2, then returned psi=M_psi^-1/2 u with M_psi normalization.
Residuals are ||K psi - lambda M_psi psi||_2 / ||psi||_Mpsi in the original stiffness variables.
Dense Hermitian Jacobi reference path is bounded to totalDof <= 512; it is intended for current explicit matrices, not production-scale spectra.
Solved B=M_psi^-1/2 K M_psi^-1/2, then returned psi=M_psi^-1/2 u with M_psi normalization.
Residuals are ||K psi - lambda M_psi psi||_2 / ||psi||_Mpsi in the original stiffness variables.
Dense Hermitian Jacobi reference path is bounded to totalDof <= 512; it is intended for current explicit matrices, not production-scale spectra.

persistedBlock.construction: G_k[i,j] = psi_i^dagger deltaK psi_j = <psi_i, deltaA psi_j>_M

metrics.basisInvariantDisclosure: Frobenius norm, trace, trace(G^2), and determinant are invariant under unitary changes of shell basis.

decision: Both persisted Phase12 K matrices expose the required topology-kernel boundary and complete lowest nonzero shell at indices 48..51, with index 52 as an outside-shell sentinel. All 24 persisted/analytic deltaK variations produce nonzero Hermitian projected shell blocks with weighted pairing identity, block parity, invariant parity, and fixed-mesh hash immutability. This is a nonphysical discrete-only boundary result.
